signatures.intro: Matt's handpicked combos. No decisions required.

items.name: The Classic Matt
items.toppings: Grilled chicken, shredded cheddar, ranch, chives

items.name: The Pulled Pork Paradise
items.toppings: Pulled pork, queso blanco, BBQ, pickled jalapeños

items.name: The Buffalo Bomb
items.toppings: Grilled chicken, pepper jack, buffalo, ranch

items.name: The Sweet & Smoky
items.toppings: Pulled pork, shredded cheddar, sriracha honey

items.name: The Baked Boss
items.toppings: Shaved steak, queso blanco, sour cream, caramelized onions, chives

items.name: The Veggie Victory
items.toppings: Black beans, roasted veggies, crumbled feta, garlic aioli, pico de gallo

items.name: Matt's Meats
items.toppings: Grilled chicken, Pulled pork, Shaved steak, Crispy bacon bits, Shredded Cheddar, BBQ sauce

items.name: Pocket Spud
items.toppings: Just a classic baked potato with butter — no toppings

bases.intro: Your foundation. Pick one — build from there.

items.name: Curly Fries
items.desc: Crispy, seasoned spirals — the crowd favorite

items.name: Shoestring Fries
items.desc: Super thin, extra crispy, light as air

items.name: Crispy Crowns
items.desc: Flat and crispy — maximum crunch per bite

items.name: Sweet Potato Fries
items.desc: Naturally sweet with a satisfying crisp

items.name: Baked Potato
items.desc: Classic half-open loaded style, fully customizable

proteins.intro: Pick one. Add a second protein for +$2.50.

items.name: Chili
items.desc: Hearty beef chili with a little heat

items.name: Black Beans
items.desc: Seasoned and hearty — great vegetarian base

cheeses.intro: Pick one. Add a second cheese for $0.50.

items.name: Queso Blanco
items.desc: Warm, creamy, drizzled on top — fan favorite

items.name: Shredded Pepper Jack
items.desc: A little kick, a lot of flavor

items.name: Crumbled Feta
items.desc: Salty, tangy — pairs great with veggies and sweet potato

sauces.intro: Pick up to two. Additional sauces $0.50 each.

items.name: Sriracha Honey
items.desc: Sweet heat — especially good on sweet potato

extras.intro: Two extras included with every build. Additional extras $0.50 each.

drinks.intro: Something to wash it all down.

pricingSummary.heading: How It Works
